objects.name: Workflow
objects.description: A workflow contains meta information about an Actions workflow file.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the Workflow object.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the workflow.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for this workflow.

fields.name: runs
fields.description: The runs of the workflow.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

fields.name: state
fields.description: The state of the workflow.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was last updated.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The HTTP URL for this workflow.

objects.name: WorkflowFileReference
objects.description: A workflow that must run for this rule to pass.

fields.name: path
fields.description: The path to the workflow file.

fields.name: ref
fields.description: The ref (branch or tag) of the workflow file to use.

fields.name: repositoryId
fields.description: The ID of the repository where the workflow is defined.

fields.name: sha
fields.description: The commit SHA of the workflow file to use.

fields.name: checkSuite
fields.description: The check suite this workflow run belongs to.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: deploymentReviews
fields.description: The log of deployment reviews.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

fields.name: displayTitle
fields.description: The human-readable title of the workflow run.

fields.name: event
fields.description: The event that triggered the workflow run.

fields.name: file
fields.description: The workflow file.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the WorkflowRun object.

fields.name: pendingDeploymentRequests
fields.description: The pending deployment requests of all check runs in this workflow run.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for this workflow run.

fields.name: runAttempt
fields.description: The attempt number of this workflow run.

fields.name: runNumber
fields.description: A number that uniquely identifies this workflow run in its parent workflow.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was last updated.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The HTTP URL for this workflow run.

fields.name: workflow
fields.description: The workflow executed in this workflow run.

fields.name: edges
fields.description: A list of edges.

fields.name: nodes
fields.description: A list of nodes.

fields.name: pageInfo
fields.description: Information to aid in pagination.

fields.name: totalCount
fields.description: Identifies the total count of items in the connection.

fields.name: cursor
fields.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

fields.name: node
fields.description: The item at the end of the edge.

objects.name: WorkflowRunFile
objects.description: An executed workflow file for a workflow run.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the WorkflowRunFile object.

fields.name: path
fields.description: The path of the workflow file relative to its repository.

fields.name: repositoryFileUrl
fields.description: The direct link to the file in the repository which stores the workflow file.

fields.name: repositoryName
fields.description: The repository name and owner which stores the workflow file.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for this workflow run file.

fields.name: run
fields.description: The parent workflow run execution for this file.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The HTTP URL for this workflow run file.

fields.name: viewerCanPushRepository
fields.description: If the viewer has permissions to push to the repository which stores the workflow.

fields.name: viewerCanReadRepository
fields.description: If the viewer has permissions to read the repository which stores the workflow.

objects.name: WorkflowsParameters
objects.description: Require all changes made to a targeted branch to pass the specified workflows before they can be merged.

fields.name: doNotEnforceOnCreate
fields.description: Allow repositories and branches to be created if a check would otherwise prohibit it.

fields.name: workflows
fields.description: Workflows that must pass for this rule to pass.

enums.name: WorkflowRunOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which workflow run connections can be ordered.

values.name: CREATED_AT
values.description: Order workflow runs by most recently created.

values.name: DELETED
values.description: The workflow was deleted from the git repository.

values.name: DISABLED_FORK
values.description: The workflow was disabled by default on a fork.

values.name: DISABLED_INACTIVITY
values.description: The workflow was disabled for inactivity in the repository.

inputObjects.name: WorkflowFileReferenceInput
inputObjects.description: A workflow that must run for this rule to pass.

inputFields.name: ref
inputFields.description: The ref (branch or tag) of the workflow file to use.

inputFields.name: repositoryId
inputFields.description: The ID of the repository where the workflow is defined.

inputFields.name: sha
inputFields.description: The commit SHA of the workflow file to use.

inputObjects.name: WorkflowRunOrder
inputObjects.description: Ways in which lists of workflow runs can be ordered upon return.

inputFields.name: direction
inputFields.description: The direction in which to order workflow runs by the specified field.

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description: The field by which to order workflows.

inputObjects.name: WorkflowsParametersInput
inputObjects.description: Require all changes made to a targeted branch to pass the specified workflows before they can be merged.

inputFields.name: doNotEnforceOnCreate
inputFields.description: Allow repositories and branches to be created if a check would otherwise prohibit it.

inputFields.name: workflows
inputFields.description: Workflows that must pass for this rule to pass.
